# One-on-One Coaching

<div class="template-meta" markdown>
**Category:** Human Resources | **Version:** 2.0 | **Status:** Active
</div>

## Overview

Structure meaningful manager-employee conversations at BrainSAIT focused on growth, performance, wellbeing, and career development in our fast-paced healthcare AI environment.

---

## Channel Structure

### 1:1 Channels

| Channel | Purpose | Visibility |
|---------|---------|------------|
| `#1on1-[manager]-[employee]` | Private 1:1 channel | Manager + Employee only |
| `#managers-forum` | Manager best practices | All managers |
| `#people-resources` | HR templates and guides | All employees |

---

## Meeting Cadence

| Meeting Type | Frequency | Duration | Focus |
|--------------|-----------|----------|-------|
| **Weekly 1:1** | Weekly | 30 min | Tactical, blockers, priorities |
| **Growth Check-in** | Monthly | 45 min | Development, feedback, career |
| **Performance Review** | Quarterly | 60 min | Goals, achievements, ratings |

---

## 1:1 Templates

### Weekly 1:1 Agenda

```markdown
## Weekly 1:1 - [Date]

**Manager:** @[name]
**Employee:** @[name]

### Check-in (5 min)

- How are you doing this week? (1-10)
- Anything on your mind personally?

### Priorities & Progress (10 min)

**This Week's Focus:**

- [ ] [Priority 1] - Status: ✅/🔄/🚫
- [ ] [Priority 2] - Status: ✅/🔄/🚫
- [ ] [Priority 3] - Status: ✅/🔄/🚫

**Key Wins:**

- [Win 1]

### Blockers & Support Needed (10 min)

- [ ] [Blocker] - Need: [Support]

### Next Week (5 min)

- [ ] [Upcoming priority 1]
- [ ] [Upcoming priority 2]

### Parking Lot

- [Topics for future discussion]
```

### Monthly Growth Check-in

```markdown
## Growth Check-in - [Month]

**Manager:** @[name]
**Employee:** @[name]
**Date:** [Date]

### Reflection (10 min)

**What went well this month:**

- [Achievement 1]
- [Achievement 2]

**What was challenging:**

- [Challenge 1]
- [Challenge 2]

### Skills & Development (15 min)

**Current Focus Areas:**

| Skill | Progress | Next Step |
|-------|----------|-----------|
| [Skill 1] | [Status] | [Action] |
| [Skill 2] | [Status] | [Action] |

**Learning Completed:**

- [ ] [Course/certification]

**Learning Planned:**

- [ ] [Upcoming training]

### Feedback Exchange (10 min)

**Manager → Employee:**
> [Specific, actionable feedback]

**Employee → Manager:**
> [Feedback on support, communication, etc.]

### Career Discussion (10 min)

- Short-term goals (6 months):
- Long-term aspirations:
- Support needed:

### Action Items

- [ ] [Action] - Owner: @[name] - Due: [Date]
```

### Quarterly Performance Review

```markdown
## Q[X] Performance Review

**Employee:** @[name]
**Manager:** @[name]
**Review Period:** [Start] - [End]

### Goal Achievement

| Goal | Target | Actual | Rating |
|------|--------|--------|--------|
| [Goal 1] | [Target] | [Actual] | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| [Goal 2] | [Target] | [Actual] | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| [Goal 3] | [Target] | [Actual] | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ |

### BrainSAIT Values Assessment

| Value | Examples | Rating |
|-------|----------|--------|
| **Healthcare Impact** | [Example] | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| **Customer Focus** | [Example] | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| **Innovation** | [Example] | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| **Collaboration** | [Example] | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| **Integrity** | [Example] | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ |

### Key Accomplishments

1. [Accomplishment with impact]
2. [Accomplishment with impact]
3. [Accomplishment with impact]

### Areas for Development

1. [Area] - Plan: [Development plan]
2. [Area] - Plan: [Development plan]

### Overall Rating

[ ] Exceeds Expectations
[ ] Meets Expectations
[ ] Developing
[ ] Needs Improvement

### Manager Comments

[Overall assessment and recognition]

### Employee Comments

[Self-reflection and response]

### Next Quarter Goals

1. [Goal] - Metric: [How measured]
2. [Goal] - Metric: [How measured]
3. [Goal] - Metric: [How measured]

### Signatures

- Manager: _____________ Date: _______
- Employee: _____________ Date: _______
```

---

## Key Messages

### New 1:1 Setup

> 👋 **Welcome to our 1:1 channel!**
>
> Hi @[employee-name],
>
> This is our private space for ongoing conversations about your work, growth, and anything on your mind.
>
> **Our 1:1 Schedule:**
>
> - Weekly: [Day, Time] (30 min)
> - Monthly Growth Check-in: First [Day] of month
>
> **What to Expect:**
>
> - A safe space for open conversation
> - Focus on YOUR priorities and growth
> - Two-way feedback
> - Career development support
>
> **Before Each 1:1:**
> Please update the agenda doc with your topics: [Link]
>
> Looking forward to our conversations!

### Tough Conversation Template

> **Difficult Conversation Notes**
>
> **Topic:** [Issue to address]
> **Date:** [Date]
>
> **Situation:**
> [Specific, observable facts]
>
> **Impact:**
> [Effect on team, customers, or work]
>
> **Expectation:**
> [What needs to change]
>
> **Support:**
> [How manager will help]
>
> **Timeline:**
> [When improvement expected]
>
> **Follow-up:**
> [When to check progress]

---

## Coaching Best Practices

!!! tip "Effective 1:1s at BrainSAIT"
    - **Consistency**: Never cancel; reschedule if needed
    - **Employee-Owned**: Their agenda first, your items second
    - **Future-Focused**: Spend 70% on forward-looking topics
    - **Action-Oriented**: End with clear next steps
    - **Document**: Keep notes for continuity
    - **Confidential**: Build trust with discretion

---

## Discussion Topics

### When Things Are Going Well

- Career aspirations and growth
- New responsibilities or stretch projects
- Recognition and celebration
- Knowledge sharing opportunities
- Mentorship (giving or receiving)

### When Things Are Challenging

- Workload and prioritization
- Team dynamics
- Skill gaps and training needs
- Role clarity
- Motivation and engagement

### Healthcare AI-Specific Topics

- NPHIES and healthcare knowledge growth
- Agent expertise development
- Customer interaction learnings
- Technical skill building
- Industry certification progress

---

## Integration Points

- **Google Calendar**: 1:1 scheduling
- **Notion**: Agenda templates and notes
- **Lattice/15Five**: Performance management
- **BrainSAIT Academy**: Learning tracking
- **HR System**: Goal and review records
